config.custom_prompt: Pitch myself (Muhammad Mughees, Computer Science student) for an AI / Machine Learning Engineering Internship. Highlight my ability to build and deploy LLM applications, integrate APIs, set up multi-agent automation workflows, and write clean backend Python/JS code. The email should research what AI/tech products the company is currently building or using, and propose specific ways I can help accelerate their engineering or automation tasks. Request a brief 10-minute call to discuss how I can add immediate value to their team.I have attached the resume to work on
config.prompt_doc_content:
MUHAMMAD MUGHEES TAYYAB
Islamabad, Pakistan |0310-4579229 |muhammadmugheestayyab@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/mugheestayyabkundi |github.com/MugheesTayyab |mugheeskundi.vercel.app
SUMMARY
Lead Generation Specialist with hands on experience designing and running automated cold email and outreach systems,
including AI driven lead enrichment pipelines and personalized email campaigns. Proven track record of building scalable
outbound workflows using LangGraph, Playwright, and CRM tools, achieving a 60 percent response rate and converting cold
outreach into qualified interviews.
EXPERIENCE
AI Agentic Intern Present
Tynovate Studio Remote
• Built and maintained automated, multi agent outreach workflows for lead enrichment and personalized email generation,
reducing manual research time per lead
• Designed a self correcting retry loop with grounded citation verification to ensure accuracy of AI generated lead data
before outreach
Independent Lead Generation & Cold Outreach Campaign Self Directed
• Designed and executed a 30 company cold email outreach campaign targeting Pakistani businesses and US based founders,
achieving a 60 percent response rate, 10 direct replies, and 2 interview opportunities
• Built a custom outreach tracking system using Mailmeteor and Google Sheets to manage personalized email sequences,
follow ups, and response logging at scale
• Developed an agentic lead enrichment pipeline using LangGraph and Playwright to automate prospect research, data
scraping, and CRM style record population for client and practice campaigns
• Wrote and A/B tested personalized cold email templates segmented by industry and role to improve open and reply rates
Vice Head FAST Computing Society
• Led outreach and communication efforts to coordinate event sponsorships, partnerships, and member engagement cam-
paigns
• Managed email communication pipelines for event announcements and follow ups across a large student member base
Volunteer AI Instructor Community Teaching Initiative
• Taught foundational AI and programming concepts to underprivileged students, translating technical material into acces-
sible lessons
KEYPROJECTS
Cold Outbound Hyper-Personalizer LangGraph, Python, Gemini API
• Architected a multi agent pipeline automating lead enrichment, personalized email drafting, and citation grounded fact
verification for cold outreach at scale, with self correcting retry logic to flag and fix inaccurate claims before sending
SKILLS
Lead Generation & Outreach: Cold Email Campaigns, Email Personalization, A/B Testing, Mailmeteor, Cold Outreach Strat-
egy, Lead Enrichment, Prospect Research, CRM Data Management, Follow Up Sequencing, Response Rate Optimization
Automation & Tools: LangGraph, LangChain, Playwright (Web Scraping/Automation), Google Sheets API, Python, n8n style
Workflow Automation, FastAPI
Technical: Python, C++, Gemini API, PostgreSQL, Docker, Next.js, Git/GitHub
Core Competencies: Pipeline Management, Communication, Cross Functional Collaboration, Data Driven Decision Making,
Time Management
EDUCATION
FAST National University of Computer and Emerging Sciences (NUCES) Expected 2028
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science Islamabad, Pakistan
CERTIFICATIONS
Generative AI Certification |Runner Up, Atomcamp Hackathon (Nucleus Adaptive LMS Project)
